node.text: James's first gaming system was a Nintendo where he played Super Mario and The Legend of Zelda, sparking his passion for gaming.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James tried Cyberpunk 2077 yesterday and found it addictive.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James loves playing strategy games like Civilization and Total War, which inspired him to create his own game.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 22 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James has a nostalgic attachment to old gaming setups, like playing on his mother's friend's console when he was young.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James appreciates the creativity and complexity of games, spending hours playing and learning from them.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James learned that perseverance, patience, feedback, and collaboration are essential in game development.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 22 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James found the process of creating the game challenging, especially balancing mechanics and fairness.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 22 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James's apartment lost power three days ago, disrupting his game progress as he forgot to save.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James finished a Unity strategy game that he put a lot of time and effort into.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "mother friend visit") on Session 22 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James adopted a pup from a shelter in Stamford last week and named it Ned, making his days happier.
